product.name: Ari Bez
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny i dzianiny z włókna AriPam odporne na UV
product.familyDescriptorEn: UV-resistant AriPam fibre fabrics and knits
product.categorySourceGroup: AriPam spun fabrics for shoe lining
product.specLine: 180 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
descriptions: It is used as a lining inside of the shoes.
Ari Bez can also be used on outdoor medical cloth.
180 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Description mentions it 'can also be used on outdoor medical cloth', but this is a secondary, vague mention without specific medical garment context, standards, or barrier properties described, making it insufficiently direct for a confident match.
